task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Counter API** (Level 3)

Build a stateful counter. GET /api/count returns { count: N }. POST /api/increment increases count by 1 and returns the new count. POST /api/reset sets count to 0.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

# Your code here

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
  - POST /api/reset ‚Üí expect {"status":200}
  - GET /api/count ‚Üí expect {"status":200,"bodyHas":["count"]}
  - POST /api/increment ‚Üí expect {"status":200,"bodyHas":[
final_source:
build for javascript backend

/*
DATAFLOW:
‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê
‚îÇ   Counter API    ‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î§
‚îÇ In-memory state: ‚îÇ
‚îÇ   count = 0      ‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î§
‚îÇ Endpoints:       ‚îÇ
‚îÇ GET /count       ‚îÇ
‚îÇ POST /increment  ‚îÇ
‚îÇ POST /reset      ‚îÇ
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò
*/

create state:
  count = 0

when user calls GET /api/count:
  send back state

when user calls POST /api/increment:
  state's count = state's count + 1
  send back state

when user calls POST /api/reset:
  state's count = 0
  send back state
